scripts.install: concurrently -n backend,frontend,admin -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend install" "npm --prefix frontend install" "npm --prefix admin install"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend,admin -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173" "npm --prefix admin run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5174"
